mapper.select: SELECT stat_id AS statId, api_path AS apiPath, api_name AS apiName, request_method AS requestMethod, avg_response_time AS avgResponseTime, max_response_time AS maxResponseTime, min_response_time AS minResponseTime, total_requests AS totalRequests, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, tps, stat_time AS statTime FROM sys_monitor_api_stats ORDER BY stat_time DESC
